I think you're extrapolating a bit too much here, tbh. He specifically says that he "can't become stronger" (as he wishes to) because his soul is like that. The strength Caecus wants is full transformation. He's saying he can't fully transform because his soul is filthy. That's the opposite of saying seafarers inherently have filthy souls

embeds.title: Irem
embeds.description: Irem, or Irim, is a legendary city mentioned multiple times in the Cthulhu Mythos stories of H. P. Lovecraft, Robert Bloch, and August Derleth. It was the City of Pillars visited by the Mad Arab...
